Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Way]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Way tries to force order out of the chaos of colliding worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel can access the Way to draw flows of pure order.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Way governs the proper flow of time.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Way is often likened to a tree or a branching vine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Suriel thinks of the Way as a network of veins stretching from a central heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Way provides order, stability, and protection from the void.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Way shone through once the barrier lifted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Way does not make a Judge strong.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Northstrider stepped through the Way to reach the Ninecloud Court audience chamber.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Way is a place that can be entered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Monarchs can track others when they step through the Way.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider flows into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Way is a space between worlds that looks like a tunnel of textured blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Mad King created something that hid him from the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Way was trembling.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — The Way is a location that can be traveled through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Way is a force that can knit planets back together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — The Way is described as an endless blue ribbon behind the darkness of madra.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — The Way is a location that Ozriel's authority spills into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel warned Yerin that she was casting herself into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Way is a dimension that can be accessed via portals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Control over the Way needs to be re-established before Lindon ascends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Way is a place Lindon and Fury prepare to enter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 38''' — The Way feels distant in this iteration.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — One of the fundamental properties of the Way is that it sustains coherent existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Way is a concept related to stable reality and connections between worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Way is a method of travel used to reach the Iteration.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
